hooks.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q '"file_path".*index\.ts' && echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'export.*from'; then echo 'BLOCKED: No barrel exports (index.ts re-exports). Import from direct file paths.' >&2; exit 2; fi
echo 'Reminder: run /validate before /finish to ensure all checks pass.'
